title: Iran’s supreme leader in the shadows: CIA hunts for signs of Mojtaba Khamenei
summary_full: Global intelligence agencies, including the CIA and Mossad, are closely monitoring Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, who has remained largely out of public view since assuming power. Reports suggest he may have been injured, leading to uncertainty about his authority and the true command structure in Tehran amidst ongoing targeted strikes.
